company_context: Hathora | Compute orchestration across GPUs and CPUs Hathora is joining Fireworks AI. Read our press release to learn more. Our platform will be shutting down on May 5th, 2026. We are partnering with GameFabric by Nitrado as our migration partner, learn more about migrating to GameFabric . Comprehensive Compute Orchestration Simply aggregate CPUs or GPUs for high performance, low latency, real-time applications. Talk to an engineer Read our docs Built by former forward deployed engineers, backed by top investors, and used by millions. The future of compute Compute aggregation for high performance, low latency, real-time applications. Universal Orchestration Run workloads across your own infrastructure or Hathora's global fleet with seamless spillover, intelligent load balancing, and 99.9% uptime built in. Edge Compute Deploy compute at the edge to minimize round-trip latency and maximize real-time responsiveness. Automatically route workloads to the closest region for sub-50 ms performance worldwide. Data Sovereignty Maintain strict data locality with region-locked deployments that keep workloads and storage within jurisdictional boundaries. Simplify compliance and customer assurance across regions. Container Native Deploy any Docker-based workload with full orchestration, GPU scheduling, and autoscaling out of the box. If it runs in Docker, it runs on Hathora—no re-architecture required. conversation.speaker: Seller
conversation.message: Hi, my name is Alex from DeepData AI. I came across Hathora and was impressed with the work you're doing in compute orchestration. I'd like to introduce our data processing solution, which I think could complement your existing infrastructure.

conversation.speaker: Buyer
conversation.message: Ah, Hathora. Yeah, we're actually in the process of shutting down our platform and migrating to GameFabric. What makes you think your solution would be a good fit for us, especially during this transition?

conversation.speaker: Seller
conversation.message: I understand the transition might seem like a challenging time, but our solution can actually help streamline your data processing and reduce latency. We've had success with similar companies in the past, and I'd love to discuss how DeepData AI can support your goals.

conversation.speaker: Buyer
conversation.message: I'm not sure that's a priority for us right now. We're trying to minimize new investments while we navigate this migration. What kind of pricing are we looking at for your solution?

conversation.speaker: Seller
conversation.message: Our pricing is competitive, and we offer customized plans based on the specific needs of our clients. However, I can tell you that our standard package starts at $50,000 per year. We've found that our solution can provide significant ROI, especially in terms of reduced latency and improved real-time responsiveness.

conversation.speaker: Buyer
conversation.message: That's a bit steep for us, especially considering we're not even sure what our new infrastructure will look like after the migration. And to be honest, I'm not the person who makes purchasing decisions for new tools. You'd need to speak with our CFO, and even then, I'm not sure we'd be able to approve something like this without a thorough evaluation of our existing vendors and competitors.

conversation.speaker: Seller
conversation.message: I understand your concerns, and I appreciate your transparency. Would it be possible to schedule a follow-up conversation with your CFO to discuss how DeepData AI can support your organization's goals and provide a more detailed overview of our solution?

conversation.speaker: Buyer
conversation.message: I appreciate the offer, but I don't think that would be necessary. As I said, we're not in a position to consider new tools at this time, and even if we were, the decision would be out of my hands. I think it's best if we focus on completing our migration and reassessing our priorities afterwards. Thank you for reaching out, but I'm going to have to decline any further discussion about DeepData AI at this time.

analysis.raw:
Score: 2
Outcome: Failure
Key_Objection: Timing
Feedback: The seller should have better qualified the buyer's current needs and priorities before pitching the solution, to avoid investing time in a conversation that was unlikely to yield a positive outcome. Sentiment: Neutral
